effectCompatibilityNote: beta.99 is validated with skipLibCheck at package boundaries because the published unstable HTTP declarations currently reference a non-exported internal helper; public API fixtures still typecheck and execute.

compatibilityDecisions.decision: Select one exact Effect v4 beta across Effect ecosystem packages.
compatibilityDecisions.evidence: All rendered package variants and the repository fixture must pass structural, type, test, and build verification before this snapshot is replaced.

compatibilityDecisions.decision: Select Start and Router independently and disable verbatimModuleSyntax at the app boundary for this snapshot.

compatibilityDecisions.decision: Select the exact Alchemy beta used by the preview-only Cloudflare Website scaffold; any upgrade opens a new compatibility epoch.
